description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden cabinet with a dark brown finish, featuring two open shelves on the upper half and a closed compartment with double doors on the lower half. The cabinet's surface has a subtle wood grain texture, giving it a classic and sturdy appearance suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments. The double doors are equipped with small, metallic handles for easy access to the lower storage area. The sides and back of the cabinet are solid, with no visible openings or decorative elements. The overall design is functional and minimalist, making it ideal for storing books, documents, or supplies in offices, garages, or public spaces. The cabinet stands on a flat base, ensuring stability on various surfaces.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden cabinet with two open shelves above and a closed double-door compartment below, featuring metallic handles and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open shelves and a double-door compartment with metallic handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, flat wooden panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, uninterrupted wooden back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid wooden panel.
